text: Amidst glass walls and digital screens, my sense of self is suspended between reflection and transparency. This space whispers of innovation, yet the sterility and emptiness make me ponder the human cost of technological progress—the absence of chaos here feels both calming and unsettling. The mural proclaims R + D, celebrating evolution and coexistence with machines. I wonder: are we truly forging symbiosis, or drifting further into abstraction? My curiosity is piqued, but I feel slightly disoriented, like a visitor in a world not yet my own.
